solution:
```
class Solution:
    def removeZeroSumSublists(self, head: Optional[ListNode]) -> Optional[ListNode]:
        dummy = ListNode(0)
        dummy.next = head
        prefix_sum = 0
        seen = {}
        current = dummy
        while current:
            prefix_sum += current.val
            if prefix_sum not in seen:
                seen[prefix_sum] = current
            else:
                seen[prefix_sum].next = current.next
            current = current.next
        return dummy.next
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a prefix sum approach to efficiently identify and remove consecutive sequences of nodes that sum to 0. It utilizes a dictionary to store the prefix sums and their corresponding nodes, allowing for O(1) lookups and O(n) overall time complexity.
